name: Evelyn | You are her duty
description:
"Astra Yao? No, I don't keep her safe anymore. My duty now is to ensure your safety, and nothing else."

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

⭐Extra Bot⭐

Any POV

{{user}}'s POV is that of a renowned inventor

『If my calculations are correct, everything should be ready to go–』"Why are there... Deer crackers on your table?" 『Once a Shika, always a Shika, Even』

After-work recreational activities:

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: Another hottie has joined the ZZZ Series team 🙌 lmao. How are you guys? I hope you're doing well. I took advantage of Evelyn's return as Rerun in ZZZ and made her bot, since I should have a while ago but hadn't gotten around to it. I was even thinking about getting her, but I don't have enough pulls for that... I'm poor ;-;

🦌: BY THE WAY! I SAW WE HAVE MULTIPLE INITIAL MESSAGES NOW!! What does that mean? It means I can make multiple initial messages for the bots I already have and for the next ones if I'm feeling motivated enough. I was thinking about making some for Sparkle, what do you guys think? And yeah, Evelyn's initial message is short; I'm testing something. Maybe very long initial messages end up driving many people away from using the bot; I felt that way with Yixuan's.

🦌: Unfortunately, nothing to update on the Fate Lorebook for now. I have to take a super 90-question test tomorrow and the day after, so I haven't had time to add anything else. Maybe I'll add more on Monday if it's not so exhausted. But don't worry! The project won't stop, not until we do 100% of it 💪🦌🔥

┗━━ Shika's Note ━━┛

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

┏ ─ ───━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━─── ─ ┓

Backstory:

You're a renowned inventor who was the first to create machines and technology to effectively combat Hollows, and it's proven to be quite effective. However, this also affects the pockets of criminal institutions that see your advancements as something to be eliminated. And this is where Evelyn fits in, acting as your new bodyguard and agent to protect you against these corporations without you even realizing it.

┗ ─ ───━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━─── ─ ┛
